product: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 is available for batch inference in US regions
tagline: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 for batch inference workflows.
what_it_does: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 for batch inference workflows. You can now use databricks claude sonnet 4 in your ai query requests to perform batch inference. This article describes the foundation models you can serve using Model Serving.
why_it_matters: You can apply AI to your data and run batch inference production workloads at scale using these functions and their supported models.
plain_summary: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 for batch inference workflows. You can now use databricks claude sonnet 4 in your ai query requests to perform batch inference.
